name: Hot Dog Stew
recipeIngredient: 6 T oil (corn oil, margarine, or oil)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a very large skillet or a medium Dutch oven, make a light roux with the oil and flour.
2. Add onion, garlic, and pepper; sauté until the vegetables are tender.
3. Add chopped potatoes in chunks, stirring around a little.
4. Add water to cover; bring to a boil, then reduce heat to simmer.
5. Add hot dogs cut into chunks, stir, and continue cooking until the potatoes are falling apart (about 30-40 minutes), adding water if necessary.
6. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
7. Serve with a dab of yellow mustard on the side for added flavor.
